name: The Minami-Nippon Bank,Ltd.
summary: The Minami-Nippon Bank,Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individual and corporate customers in Japan. The company accepts savings, ordinary, time, and reserve time, periodic, and foreign currency deposits; and certificates of deposit. Its loan products include card, free, car, education, and business loans. The company also offers investment trusts and government bonds; life and non-life insurance, and pension products; cash and debit cards; payroll transfer/automatic pension receipt; online fund transfer; and other services, as well as rating agency, fund management, security, and internet and mobile banking services. In addition, it provides leasing; and transport and security services. The company operates 64 branches. The Minami-Nippon Bank,Ltd. was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.
